content.text: Task list has been updated with 7 item(s).

task_list.title: Read acceptance criteria and plan
task_list.notes: Read and analyze acceptance-criteria.json and .rhino-plan.md to understand the requirements.

task_list.title: Map ACs to tests
task_list.notes: Map each acceptance criterion to existing or new tests.

task_list.title: Read existing tests and factories
task_list.notes: Examine existing tests, factories, and helpers in the codebase.

task_list.title: Write feature and isolation tests
task_list.notes: Write comprehensive integration/feature tests for all ACs, including isolation and Extras.

task_list.title: Run tests and fix failures
task_list.notes: Run the test suite and iterate on fixing any failures.

task_list.title: Update AC status to tested
task_list.notes: Update the status of each AC in acceptance-criteria.json to 'tested'.

task_list.title: Verify coverage and finish
task_list.notes: Perform a final verification of test coverage and complete the stage.
